text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest is here, and ardent fans from far and
wide flock to Tracen Academy in the hopes of
seeing this spring's star racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is here, along with Mejiro McQueen.
And among them stands... Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you know the talk show happening? Well,
I'm... gonna talk about how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how well it'll be received, but I want
people to see the real me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I send her off with a pat on the back. She should
do exactly what she wants with this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goal for this spring, you ask? Well, that
should be obvious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's to become the hero of the Grand Swan stands
in Kyoto. In other words, I will claim victory at
this spring's Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is my destiny as a member of the Mejiro family.
I hope for everyone's generous support there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, Mejiro McQueen stands out from
the pack. On the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: And what's your goal, Mejiro Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, my goal is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: To do my best and hope it goes well!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: You, uh—you hope it goes well. I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's off to a clumsy start...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know. I'm not at the level of the runners you'd
consider stars...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not the elegant speaker that McQueen
is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But it's frustrating for Umamusume like me! To
always be hiding in the shadows...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's sad to think that people who are clearly giving
it their best will never make it into the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere changes, and everyone starts
paying closer attention to the interview.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I want to believe I'll be seen when I try my
hardest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I want to show everyone that people like me can
still stand out when we put all our heart into
something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was never comfortable with the expectations
people had for me before. I couldn't deal with it...
But things are different now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes on me! Because I'm ready for
anything, just as I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll live up to your expectations, and race more
passionately than any superstar out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's words of determination have taken root in
the hearts of the fans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, she's really come into her own, hasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan—I'm certain that she's lamented to you over
how she lacks in charisma.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, she has such low self-esteem. As always, she
doesn't understand herself particularly well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is only one thing she lacks—the
determination to carry the burden of others'
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Outstanding talent lies within her... If she can find
the resolve to use it, she'll become a magnificent
star.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides, when it comes to stars... The ones that
shine first may not always shine the brightest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Some grow ever brighter as they gain a following.
That girl will be the Joan of Arc of us
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm back! I think I did better than I expected!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, is something the matter?
choice_data_list: You were like Joan of Arc out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan has started to show signs of becoming a
superstar, as well as her potential to become an
incredible racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For that to happen, she needs to keep growing.
And first up is the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Um... Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
You said you weren't suited for the spotlight, but
you've been famous since you were little, haven't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh, really? Me?! Since when?!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
You were all the talk among us racing enthusiasts.
We knew you'd be a great runner ever since you
were a kid.

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
So please, continue to flex your muscular beauty!
I'm a big collector of your photos and all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, they really do exist! It might only be a
few, but there are people out there who follow
and respect me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are more people supporting her than
expected. And it seems some of the fans also love
Ryan for her strong physique.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's even more motivation for her to make
them proud. It's time to focus on the spring Tenno
Sho!
